scroll_found.title: Research the Many Tables scroll at a Research Pedestal

brewing_station.title: Set up a complete fermentation room: barrel, brewing stand, Hearth & Harvest cask, and tea kettle

subtitle.text: A civilization that eats well together lasts longer than one that doesn't.

description: CH.04 · THE MANY TABLES
▸ The scroll catalogs a civilization's culinary stations.
Not a house. A system.
Barrels for grain. Casks for honey.
Stand for potions. Kettle for morning tea.
Everything in its place. Always running.
◈ THE COMPLETE FERMENTATION SETUP
└ Barrel (vanilla): grain storage, general ferment
└ Brewing Stand: potions, powered by blaze
└ Hearth & Harvest Cask: honey mead, fruit wine,
long-ferment beverages — aged for better quality
└ Tea Kettle (Herbal Brews on F&C Stove): daily teas,
buff drinks, quick-use ferments
└ Vinery Barrel: wine-specific fermentation
└ Brewin & Chewin Station: temperature-based spirits
◈ AUTOMATION POTENTIAL
└ Create can fill barrels via Spout + Fluid Pipe
└ Automate: grape juice → barrel input
└ Automate: barrel output → chest storage
└ Ch07 oil refinery uses same fluid pipe logic
◈ SCROLL: The Many Tables
└ Found in: feast hall ruins, village communal house,
banquet hall loot, old brewery archives
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full brewing station awareness,
Create automation + fermentation crossover knowledge
▸ The many tables were the last thing they left standing.
Everything else burned. The fermentation room survived.
The barrels were still full.
▶ Find The Many Tables scroll [check]
▶ Set up a complete fermentation room [check]
◇ A full fermentation room qualifies as the
'the Cultural chapter' milestone pre-req.
Ch05 opens directly after you have one running.
